name: Pixie Dust Fertilizer
effect: Increase the base production of Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths by +600 and reduce their building cost multipliers by -0.02.

name: Fairy Workers
effect: Increase the production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths based on assistants owned.

name: Spellsmith
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.

name: Golden Pots
effect: 100% of the production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths is added to base clicking reward. Also increase Faction Coin find chance by +20%.

name: Swarm of Fairies
effect: Gain assistants based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.

name: Starmetal Alloys
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on Fairy Chanting activity time this Era.
formula: (0.35 * x^0.65)%, where x = Fairy Chanting activity time this Era

name: Rainbow Link
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths built.

name: Kind Hearts
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Good Buildings built.
formula: +(1.3 * x^0.7), where x = Good buildings built

name: Bubble Swarm
effect: Increase maximum Mana based on the highest amount of Swarming Towers built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2.5 * x^1.5), where x = highest Swarming Towers this Reincarnation

name: Pheromones
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on time spent as Chaos this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Chaos time this Reincarnation

name: Dream Catchers
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.01 * ln(1+x)^6)%, where x = Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation
